bugs.error_message: Μασούτης scraper finds 0 products — card selector .product-item, .col-product does not exist on page
bugs.root_cause: STORE_CONFIGS Μασούτης used .product-item/.col-product CSS class selectors but actual DOM uses div.product. Price selector .price also wrong — actual elements are .pStartPrice and .pDscntPrice
bugs.fix: Changed card to '.product', price to '.pStartPrice', img to '.productImage, .catImgCont img, img'. Added Masoutis special-case price extraction block in extractDataInBrowser to handle discounted (.pDscntPrice) vs regular (.pStartPrice) prices

bugs.error_message: Γαλαξίας scraper finds 0 products — .product-card CSS class does not exist (Angular custom element)
bugs.root_cause: STORE_CONFIGS Γαλαξίας card selector was '.product-card, .col' (CSS class) but Galaxias uses Angular SSR with <product-card> custom element. The dot prefix selects class=product-card which doesn't exist.
bugs.fix: Changed card to 'product-card' (tag selector for Angular custom element), name to 'a.text-black-i', img to 'img[src*="galaxias.shop/api/media"], img[src*="galaxias"]'

bugs.error_message: AI Meal Plan returns 500 error 'Δεν βρέθηκε κανένα AI API key στο .env' when only ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set
bugs.root_cause: Early key-check condition only tested GEMINI_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY, BYTEZ_API_KEY — did NOT include ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. So users with only Claude configured got a false 500 error.
bugs.fix: Added !process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to the condition so it only errors when ALL four providers are missing

bugs.error_message: Meal plan JSON parse failed / truncated for 7-day plans with Claude
bugs.root_cause: callClaude had max_tokens: 8096 which is insufficient for a full 7-day meal plan with 6 meal slots/day × 2 options each (~9000+ tokens output)
bugs.fix: Increased max_tokens to 16000 in callClaude function

bugs.error_message: GymBeam recipes return 0 ingredients — parseGymBeamRecipe returned cleanIngredients/cleanInstructions (undefined variables)
bugs.root_cause: parseGymBeamRecipe's return statement used `cleanIngredients` and `cleanInstructions` variable names from a different function (parsePanosRecipe) instead of the local `ingredients` and `instructions` variables
bugs.fix: Fixed return statement to use correct variable names: ingredients and instructions

bugs.error_message: GymBeam product-promo lines ('Αλεύρι αμυγδάλου - GymBeam') appear in recipe ingredients list
bugs.root_cause: Browser-side ingredient filter in parseGymBeamRecipe only blocked lines STARTING with 'GymBeam|BIO [A-Z]' but not lines ENDING with '- GymBeam'. isRecipeNoiseLine was not called on the browser-extracted ingredients.
bugs.fix: Added sLower.includes('gymbeam') check in browser-side filter. Strengthened isRecipeNoiseLine with rawLower check for all GymBeam variants. Added section-header pattern to isRecipeSectionLine.

bugs.error_message: TheMealDB shows English titles: Budino Di Ricotta, Chicken Alfredo Primavera, Fettuccine Alfredo, Chilli prawn linguine
bugs.root_cause: These titles were missing from the MEAL_NAMES_GR static dictionary. The AI batch translation fallback should catch them but the static dict is the first line of defense.
bugs.fix: Added 20 missing titles to MEAL_NAMES_GR: 9 Italian (Budino Di Ricotta, Fettuccine Alfredo, Chicken Alfredo Primavera, etc.) and 11 Others (Chilli prawn linguine, Thai Green Curry, Jerk Chicken, etc.)
